ab: ana cu ksiyu cikah pila su?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: ana, pisa pila ksyugan su?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: waya cu mungiy maras pila la, ana cu ksiyu cikah pila su?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ini cu aras pila uyi!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: waya cu mungiy maras pila la, ana cu ksiyu cikah pila su?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: iyat cu, pilaw knsyugan su pila mu ga ini caku bi’iy nya.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: ana cu ksiyu cikah lukus su?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: ana, agan nanak.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: ana cu ksiyu cikah biru su?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: waya mu ksyugan Habaw la.
en: B: I lent it to Habaw.

ab: ksyugiy cu cikah zitengsya su ki?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ana, ana ga wahiy caku ci matu cuxan.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: mwalax la, ini cu aras ruku, ksyugiy cu cikah ruku su ki?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: utux ci ruku mu, siy ta s’un pcru la.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: kwani ga knsyugan mu pilaw biru su, nyu misu wahan me la.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: biru lalu smoya su mita loyi ga kayan caku.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: knwan bi’an misu knsyugan mu pila?
ch: A:我什麼時候要還所借你的錢?
en: A: When do I have to repay the money I borrowed from you?

ab: ana, texiy kyan pila su ga kayan caku.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: knwan bi’an caku knsyugan su pila mu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: bi’an misu cuxan.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: knwan bi’an caku knsyugan su biru mu?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: iyat misu waya bi’an hesa la?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: bbrwan hani ga knsyugan su nya Wilang?
en: A: Did Wilang lend you this pen?

ab: angu, knsyugan cu nya soni.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: bbrwan hani ga nwahan su ksiyu Masaw?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Masaw?

ab: iyat, kwani ga mnayi yaya mu.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: ungat cimu la, usa ksiyu cikah cimu Sima.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Sima.

ab: ang hala cu ksiyu.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: hay kmayan Yageh haca wahiy caku me pila mu.
en: B: Go tell Yageh to give me my money back.

ab: pisa kwara pila knsyugan nya pila su?
ch: B:她總共向你借了多少錢?
en: A: How much has she borrowed from you in total?
